queries.question: What's the family of the plane that comes from the same country as "Charles de Gaulle Airport"?
queries.sql:
SELECT Manufacturer_Name.MANUFACTURER_NAME
FROM Manufacturer_Name
JOIN Plane ON Plane.manufacturer_id = Manufacturer_Name.id
JOIN Flight ON Plane.id = Flight.plane_id
JOIN Airport ON Flight.departure_airport_id = Airport.id
WHERE Airport.name="Charles de Gaulle Airport"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?manufacturer_name2 WHERE {
  ?manufacturer_name a :manufacturers .
  ?plane a :Planes .
  ?plane p:hasManufacturer_Name ?manufacturer_name .
  ?flight a :Flights .
  ?flight p:hasPlane ?plane .
  ?airport a :Airports .
  ?flight p:hasAirport_departure_airport_id ?airport .
  ?manufacturer_name p:manufacturer_name ?manufacturer_name2 .
  ?airport p:name ?name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Charles de Gaulle Airport")
}

queries.question: What's the family of the plane that comes from the same country as "Charles de Gaulle Airport"?
queries.sql:
SELECT Model_Name.Model_Name
FROM Model_Name
JOIN Plane ON Plane.plane_model_id = Model_Name.id
JOIN Flight ON Plane.id = Flight.plane_id
JOIN Airport ON Flight.departure_airport_id = Airport.id
WHERE Airport.name="Charles de Gaulle Airport"

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?model_name2 WHERE {
  ?model_name a :Model_Name .
  ?plane a :Planes .
  ?plane p:hasModel_Name ?model_name .
  ?flight a :Flights .
  ?flight p:hasPlane ?plane .
  ?airport a :Airports .
  ?flight p:hasAirport_departure_airport_id ?airport .
  ?model_name p:model_name ?model_name2 .

queries.question: What's the manufacturer name of the plane that comes from the same country as the LAX airport?

ambiguous_dsl.question: What's the family of the plane that comes from the same country as the LAX airport?
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/airport/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?manufacturer_name2 WHERE {
  ?manufacturer_name a :manufacturers .
  ?plane a :Planes .
  ?plane p:hasManufacturer_Name ?manufacturer_name .
  ?flight a :Flights .
  ?flight p:hasPlane ?plane .
  ?airport a :Airports .
  ?flight p:hasAirport_departure_airport_id ?airport .
  ?manufacturer_name p:manufacturer_name ?manufacturer_name2 .
  ?airport p:airport_code ?airport_code_f .
  FILTER(STR(?airport_code_f) = "LAX")
} }
  full: { SELECT ?manufacturer_name2 ?model_name2 WHERE {
  ?model_name a :Model_Name .
  ?plane a :Planes .
  ?plane p:hasModel_Name ?model_name .
  ?manufacturer_name a :manufacturers .
  ?plane p:hasManufacturer_Name ?manufacturer_name .
  ?flight a :Flights .
  ?flight p:hasPlane ?plane .
  ?airport a :Airports .
  ?flight p:hasAirport_departure_airport_id ?airport .
  ?manufacturer_name p:manufacturer_name ?manufacturer_name2 .
  ?model_name p:model_name ?model_name2 .
  ?airport p:airport_code ?airport_code_f .
  FILTER(STR(?airport_code_f) = "LAX")
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?model_name2 WHERE {
  ?model_name a :Model_Name .
  ?plane a :Planes .
  ?plane p:hasModel_Name ?model_name .
  ?flight a :Flights .
  ?flight p:hasPlane ?plane .
  ?airport a :Airports .
  ?flight p:hasAirport_departure_airport_id ?airport .
  ?model_name p:model_name ?model_name2 .
  ?airport p:airport_code ?airport_code_f .
  FILTER(STR(?airport_code_f) = "LAX")
} }
}
